profile_summary: Business traveler (mid budget) prioritizing central location, business & wifi.

recommendations.justification: The Regent Heights, Lisbon ranks #1 for this traveler on central location (+0.85), business & wifi (+0.93), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "The business center and conference facilities were excellent, ideal for work trips."

supporting_evidence.quote: The business center and conference facilities were excellent, ideal for work trips.
Meeting rooms were well-equipped and the WiFi was rock solid for video calls.
Great setup for business travel: fast reliable internet and a proper desk.
